from sympy.parsing.sympy_parser import stringify_expr, standard_transformations, evaluateFalse
import ast
for s in ['1 < 2', '1 <= 2', '1 > 2', '1 >= 2', '1 "'!= 2'"', '1 == 2', '1 < 2 < 3', 'x < y == z']:
 c=stringify_expr(s, {}, {}, standard_transformations)
 print(s, '=>', c)
 print(ast.dump(ast.parse(c), indent=2))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge, symbols, srepr
from sympy.parsing.sympy_parser import parse_expr
x, y, z = symbols('x y z')
cases = [
    '1 < 2', '1 <= 2', '1 > 2', '1 >= 2', '1 == 2', '1 "'!= 2'"',
    'x < 2', '1 < x', 'x < y', 'x < x', 'x == x', 'x "'!= x'"', 'x == y', 'x "'!= y'"',
    'x + 1 < x + 2', '1 + 1 < 3',
    'True == False', 'True "'!= False'"', 'True == True', 'True < False',
    '1 < 2 < 3', '3 < 2 < 1', 'x < y < z', 'x == y == z', '1 < x < 3',
    'Eq(1, 1)', 'Ne(1, 1)', 'Lt(1, 2)', 'Eq(x, x)',
    '(1 < 2) & (3 < 4)', '(x < y) & (y < z)',
]
for case in cases:
    try:
        value = parse_expr(case, evaluate=False)
        print(f'{case"'!r:24} -> {value!r:32} type={type(value).__name__:<20} srepr={srepr(value)}'"')
    except Exception as exc:
        print(f'{case"'!r:24} !! {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}'"')
print('\\nDirect boolean constructors:')
for cls in (Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge):
    try:
        v = cls(True, False, evaluate=False)
        print(cls.__name__, repr(v), type(v).__name__, srepr(v))
    except Exception as exc:
        print(cls.__name__, type(exc).__name__, exc)
PY"

from sympy import Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge, symbols, srepr
from sympy.parsing.sympy_parser import parse_expr
x, y, z = symbols('x y z')
cases = [
    '1 < 2', '1 <= 2', '1 > 2', '1 >= 2', '1 == 2', '1 "'!= 2'"',
    'x < 2', '1 < x', 'x < y', 'x < x', 'x == x', 'x "'!= x'"', 'x == y', 'x "'!= y'"',
    'x + 1 < x + 2', '1 + 1 < 3',
    'True == False', 'True "'!= False'"', 'True == True', 'True < False',
    '1 < 2 < 3', '3 < 2 < 1', 'x < y < z', 'x == y == z', '1 < x < 3',
    'Eq(1, 1)', 'Ne(1, 1)', 'Lt(1, 2)', 'Eq(x, x)',
    '(1 < 2) & (3 < 4)', '(x < y) & (y < z)',
]
for case in cases:
    try:
        value = parse_expr(case, evaluate=False)
        print(f'{case"'!r:24} -> {value!r:32} type={type(value).__name__:<20} srepr={srepr(value)}'"')
    except Exception as exc:
        print(f'{case"'!r:24} !! {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}'"')
print('\\nDirect boolean constructors:')
for cls in (Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge):
    try:
        v = cls(True, False, evaluate=False)
        print(cls.__name__, repr(v), type(v).__name__, srepr(v))
    except Exception as exc:
        print(cls.__name__, type(exc).__name__, exc)
PY"
